description: KMP Project Foundation with State Machine (Phase 1). Create the complete Kotlin Multiplatform project structure with Compose Multiplatform, implement the core GameStateMachine with all states and transitions, build the WaitroomScreen with manual control buttons, and set up Android + Desktop source sets.
steps: Create root settings.gradle.kts with project name 'GAIME' and include ':composeApp' module
Create root build.gradle.kts with Kotlin Multiplatform and Compose plugins (apply false)
Create gradle.properties with org.gradle.jvm.args=-Xmx2048M, kotlin.code.style=official, android.useAndroidX=true, compose.multiplatform version settings
Generate Gradle wrapper (gradlew, gradlew.bat, gradle/wrapper/) using 'gradle wrapper' command

Create composeApp/build.gradle.kts configuring: kotlin multiplatform plugin, compose plugin, androidTarget, jvm('desktop') target, commonMain dependencies (compose runtime, foundation, material3, ui), desktopMain dependencies (compose desktop currentOs), android configuration (compileSdk 34, minSdk 24, targetSdk 34)
Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/core/AiWorkState.kt - enum with Idle, Working, Finished
Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/core/GameSessionState.kt - enum with Idle, Thinking, ReadyButPlaying, RevealReady, Closed, Failed
Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/core/GameEvent.kt - sealed class with AiStartedThinking, AiFinishedThinking, GameStarted, GameOver, PlayerClosedGame, Reset

Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/core/GameStateMachine.kt - class holding current GameSessionState, kiIsReady flag, and transition function. Key rule: AiFinishedThinking sets kiIsReady=true and transitions to ReadyButPlaying (if currently Thinking). GameOver in ReadyButPlaying leads to RevealReady. GameOver in Thinking stays in Thinking (no premature reveal). PlayerClosedGame leads to Closed. Reset returns to Idle.
Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/signals/AiSignalSource.kt - interface with a Flow<GameEvent> for AI signals
Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/signals/ManualSignalSource.kt - implementation that exposes functions to manually trigger events

Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/ui/WaitroomScreen.kt - Compose screen showing: current state text, 'Start Thinking' button, 'Finish Thinking' button, 'Reset' button, a placeholder Box for future canvas
Create composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/app/App.kt - top-level @Composable App() function wrapping WaitroomScreen with MaterialTheme
Create composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml with package, activity declaration, internet permission
Create composeApp/src/desktopMain/kotlin/main.kt - fun main() with application { Window(title='GAIME - AI Waitroom', size 900x600) { App() } }

Create composeApp/src/commonTest/kotlin/GameStateMachineTest.kt - tests covering: Idle->Thinking on AiStartedThinking, Thinking->ReadyButPlaying on AiFinishedThinking (and kiIsReady becomes true), ReadyButPlaying->RevealReady on GameOver, Thinking stays Thinking on GameOver (no premature reveal), RevealReady->Closed on PlayerClosedGame, any state->Idle on Reset
Create README.md with title 'GAIME - Game-Aware AI Micro-Experience', subtitle 'A Kotlin Multiplatform waitroom for AI work.', brief architecture description, build instructions
acceptance_criteria: Running ./gradlew build compiles all source sets without errors
Running ./gradlew allTests passes all GameStateMachine unit tests
State machine correctly transitions: Idle -> Thinking -> ReadyButPlaying -> RevealReady -> Closed
AiFinishedThinking does NOT end the game - it only sets kiIsReady=true and moves to ReadyButPlaying
GameOver during Thinking does NOT reveal the answer
Reset from any state returns to Idle with kiIsReady=false
findings: Java 25 is incompatible with Gradle's embedded Kotlin compiler (JavaVersion.parse fails on version 25.0.2). Fixed by setting org.gradle.java.home to JDK 21 in gradle.properties. Android SDK was not pre-installed; downloaded command-line tools and installed platforms;android-34 and build-tools;34.0.0 to /opt/android-sdk. local.properties with sdk.dir=/opt/android-sdk is needed but excluded from git. The lint task shows kotlin-stdlib metadata version warnings (2.1.0 vs expected 1.9.0) from AGP 8.2.2's bundled lint which uses an older Kotlin; these are non-blocking warnings.
